---
title: "Publications"
output: html_document
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

body {
  background: #fafafa;
}

.publication-page {
  max-width: 1080px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 56px 24px 72px;
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  color: #1f2933;
}

.pub-hero {
  margin-bottom: 42px;
  padding: 36px 40px;
  border-radius: 30px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f7f1e8 0%, #eef4ff 50%, #ffffff 100%);
  border: 1px solid rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.12);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}

.pub-kicker {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #7c5c2e;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.pub-title {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
  font-size: 3.5rem;
  line-height: 1.05;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 14px;
  color: #111827;
}

.pub-summary {
  max-width: 850px;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: #4b5563;
  margin: 0;
}

.pub-list {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 24px;
}

.pub-card {
  position: relative;
  padding: 30px 32px;
  border-radius: 26px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.28);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 35px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.07);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.pub-card::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  width: 8px;
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #1d4ed8, #0f766e);
}

.pub-card.gold::before {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #b08968, #7c5c2e);
}

.pub-card.teal::before {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #0f766e, #14b8a6);
}

.pub-card.blue::before {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #1d4ed8, #60a5fa);
}

.pub-card.gray::before {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #64748b, #94a3b8);
}

.pub-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.pub-pill {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 7px 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #f3f4f6;
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.pub-paper-title {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
  font-size: 2.05rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #111827;
  margin: 0 0 12px;
}

.pub-authors {
  font-size: 1.22rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: #374151;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.pub-authors strong {
  color: #111827;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.pub-journal {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: #4b5563;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.pub-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
}

.pub-link {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 9px 14px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #111827;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease;
}

.pub-link:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.18);
  background: #1d4ed8;
}

.pub-note {
  margin-top: 18px;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: #6b7280;
}

@media (max-width: 820px) {
  .publication-page {
    padding: 36px 16px 56px;
  }

  .pub-hero {
    padding: 28px 24px;
  }

  .pub-title {
    font-size: 2.65rem;
  }

  .pub-summary {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
  }

  .pub-paper-title {
    font-size: 1.85rem;
  }

  .pub-authors,
  .pub-journal {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
  }
}
</style>

<main class="publication-page">

<section class="pub-hero">
  <div class="pub-kicker">Selected Publications</div>
  <h1 class="pub-title">Publications</h1>
  <p class="pub-summary">
    My publications and preprints span pharmacogenomics, adverse drug reaction prediction,
    ophthalmology, clinical outcomes research, and biomedical data analysis.
  </p>
</section>

<section class="pub-list">

  <article class="pub-card blue">
    <div class="pub-meta">
      <span class="pub-pill">Preprint</span>
      <span class="pub-pill">arXiv</span>
      <span class="pub-pill">2025</span>
      <span class="pub-pill">Equal Contribution</span>
    </div>

    <h2 class="pub-paper-title">
      HyperADRs: A Hierarchical Hypergraph Framework for Drug–Gene–ADR Prediction
    </h2>

    <div class="pub-authors">
      Cai, Z.*, <strong>Tang, H.*</strong>, Gao, S., Zhou, B., Zhao, J., &amp; Wen, J.
    </div>

    <div class="pub-journal">
      <em>arXiv:2512.00137</em>. November 2025. *Equal contribution.
    </div>

    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.00137" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">arXiv</a>
    </div>
  </article>

  <article class="pub-card teal">
    <div class="pub-meta">
      <span class="pub-pill">Journal Article</span>
      <span class="pub-pill">Graefe's Archive</span>
      <span class="pub-pill">2025</span>
    </div>

    <h2 class="pub-paper-title">
      Improvement in Vision-Related Quality-of-Life Using the NEI-VFQ-9 over 1-Year in the Manhattan Vision Screening and Follow-up Study (NYC-SIGHT)
    </h2>

    <div class="pub-authors">
      Hark, L. A., Gorroochurn, P., <strong>Tang, H.</strong>, et al.
    </div>

    <div class="pub-journal">
      <em>Graefe's Archive for Clinical and Experimental Ophthalmology</em>, 263(7), 2069–2079.
    </div>

    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00417-024-06727-z" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
    </div>
  </article>

  <article class="pub-card gold">
    <div class="pub-meta">
      <span class="pub-pill">Journal Article</span>
      <span class="pub-pill">Clinical Ophthalmology</span>
      <span class="pub-pill">2025</span>
    </div>

    <h2 class="pub-paper-title">
      Association of Behavioral Factors with Activation in Patients with Age-Related Macular Degeneration or Diabetic Retinopathy
    </h2>

    <div class="pub-authors">
      Morse, A. R., Hark, L. A., Seiple, W. H., Gorroochurn, P., <strong>Tang, H.</strong>, et al.
    </div>

    <div class="pub-journal">
      <em>Clinical Ophthalmology</em>, 19, 3059–3069.
    </div>

    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://doi.org/10.2147/OPTH.S542352" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
    </div>
  </article>

  <article class="pub-card gray">
    <div class="pub-meta">
      <span class="pub-pill">Conference Abstract</span>
      <span class="pub-pill">IOVS</span>
      <span class="pub-pill">2025</span>
    </div>

    <h2 class="pub-paper-title">
      Modifying Locus of Control Beliefs May Improve Activation in Patients with Age-Related Macular Degeneration or Diabetic Retinopathy
    </h2>

    <div class="pub-authors">
      Morse, A. R., Hark, L. A., Seiple, W., Gorroochurn, P., <strong>Tang, H.</strong>, et al.
    </div>

    <div class="pub-journal">
      <em>Investigative Ophthalmology &amp; Visual Science</em>, 66(8), 699.
    </div>

    <div class="pub-links">
      <a class="pub-link" href="https://iovs.arvojournals.org/article.aspx?articleid=2805311" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">IOVS Abstract</a>
    </div>
  </article>

</section>

</main>
```
